items.title: At least 10 killed in large-scale Russian missile and drone strikes on Kyiv
items.dek: Russia launched its biggest strikes on the city in weeks with children among the "significant number" of casualties, Ukrainian officials say.
items.body: Russia launched its biggest strikes on the city in weeks with children among the "significant number" of casualties, Ukrainian officials say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: People smuggler convicted in France now seeking asylum in UK, BBC discovers
items.dek: Once described as "the godfather" of French migrant camps, he has been working in an English village.
items.body: Once described as "the godfather" of French migrant camps, he has been working in an English village.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Two weeks after her death I got a call': Gaza patients face agonising delays for evacuation
items.dek: An estimated 300 Palestinians referred for treatment abroad have died since the ceasefire began, according to Gaza's Hamas-run health ministry.
items.body: An estimated 300 Palestinians referred for treatment abroad have died since the ceasefire began, according to Gaza's Hamas-run health ministry.
items.author: IriLine Desk
